description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint and a modern, utilitarian design. The structure features a taller main tower with approximately nine stories, attached to a lower, two-story wing. The exterior is clad in light tan or beige brickwork, and the facade is dominated by large, evenly spaced rectangular windows arranged in vertical columns. The roof is flat and houses several mechanical units and vents, while the main entrance is accessed by a set of stairs and a small landing. There are additional side entrances and a red metal staircase providing access to the lower wing, suggesting multiple points of entry and egress.
description: A modern, tan brick office building with a tall main tower, large vertical windows, and a flat roof, attached to a lower two-story wing.
description_view_0: The view shows the side of the main tower and the roof of the lower wing, highlighting rooftop equipment and the building's rectangular geometry.
description_view_1: This view presents the main entrance with stairs and a landing, as well as the full width of the lower wing extending to the left.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is visible, showing the vertical window arrangement and a red metal staircase on the left side.
description_view_3: The front facade of the main tower is shown, with the main entrance stairs and the lower wing extending to the right.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical columns of large rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across all facades.
